com.mentor.chs.api

Class IXGraphicConversions.XPDFMargins

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XPDFMargins
  • Enclosing interface:
    IXGraphicConversions

    @NotToBeImplemented
public static class IXGraphicConversions.XPDFMargins
extends java.lang.Object
    Holds margin settings used in generated PDF files

    • Field Summary

      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      int bottomMargin
      Bottom margin size for generated PDF files

      Left margin size for generated PDF files

      Right margin size for generated PDF files
      int topMargin
      Top margin size for generated PDF files
